calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Off Calendar

Quiet Title-Real Property.
Off Calendar Sep-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title-Real Property Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Karen Farnsworth.
Gabriel Levine, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Stephan Thebault and Erin Weiser.
Plaintiff's Witness: Erin Wiser and Frederick T. Scherer, were sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: ALL PERSONS for the real property known as 219 Miguel St., San Francisco, see scanned doc for details of the three page judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2007 Continued To Oct-26-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
